title: cupania hirsuta
intro: Cupania hirsuta, also known as the hairy cupania, is a small to medium-sized tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, as it is rich in flavonoids and alkaloids, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cupania hirsuta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties to protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments in folk medicine.
